programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs se enfrenta a un desafío cuando Vance le asigna un nuevo asistente novato para investigar un caso de robo a un banco. La tensión aumenta mientras Gibbs y su nuevo compañero tratan de resolver el crimen y superar sus diferencias en el camino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un sorprendente secreto sale a la luz cuando el equipo se ve envuelto en un juego de guerra, y uno de sus miembros enfrentará serias consecuencias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un marine hallado en su garaje lleva a sospechar al protegido del FBI, Tobias Fornell. La investigación se intensifica cuando el sospechoso huye de un nuevo crimen. Ziva, mientras planea sus vacaciones, descubre una foto misteriosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga un crimen durante la temporada de Halloween, donde un asesino psicótico deja pistas sobre la identidad de su próxima víctima en la red.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs se enfrenta a un desafío cuando Vance le asigna un nuevo asistente novato para investigar un caso de robo a un banco. La tensión aumenta mientras Gibbs y su nuevo compañero tratan de resolver el crimen y superar sus diferencias en el camino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un sorprendente secreto sale a la luz cuando el equipo se ve envuelto en un juego de guerra, y uno de sus miembros enfrentará serias consecuencias.

programme.title: Los tuyos, los míos, y los nuestros
programme.desc: Un almirante viudo de la Guardia costera y una viuda diseñadora de bolsos se enamoran y se casan, para la consternación de sus hijos, ocho de él y diez de ella.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: El citadino Ren MacCormack se muda a un pequeño pueblo donde el rock and roll y el baile están prohibidos. Su espíritu rebelde sacude a la población.

programme.title: Vaselina

programme.desc: Muchos de los personajes de la exitosa "Grease" regresan al campus, y los nuevos son igualmente memorables, en este tributo a las faldas tubo, la seducción y el amor entre jóvenes.

programme.title: Los tuyos, los míos, y los nuestros
programme.desc: Un almirante viudo de la Guardia costera y una viuda diseñadora de bolsos se enamoran y se casan, para la consternación de sus hijos, ocho de él y diez de ella.

programme.title: Capulina contra Los monstruos
programme.desc: Capulina lee historias acerca de los monstrous y cree que existen en la realidad. Está muerto de miedo hasta que descubre que son imaginarios.

programme.title: Capulina corazón de león
programme.desc: Capulina accidentalmente adopta un león de una tienda de mascotas, pensando que es un gato. Las cosas se complican cuando, encima de todo, lo toman por asaltante.

programme.title: Capulina vs las momias
programme.desc: Un taxista lleva hasta Guanajuato al sobrino de un científico que busca en las momias el secreto de la vida.

programme.title: El Hermano Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina abandona el digno oficio de limosnero, pero no por ello va a cometer la locura de trabajar. Va a dar a una orden de Frailes que se dedican a hacer la caridad y se enfrenta a los problemas de los Frailes y los de todos a su alrededor.

programme.title: El Investigador Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina confunde al vicepresidente de una empresa con un ladrón. Sus amigos los luchadores Tinieblas y Superzan acuden en su ayuda y evitan un asalto. Capulina creyéndose el héroe decide poner una agencia de investigadores.

programme.title: El Sargento Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina quiere convertirse en superhéroe para combatir el crimen. Se enlista en la policía y después de un riguroso entrenamiento llega a ser sargento y confronta a los criminales en una serie de cómicos incidentes.

programme.title: El circo de Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina viaja a Monterrey para trabajar en un circo y ayudar a su sobrina a recuperar un terreno que ha heredado, el cual esconde un tesoro enterrado por un coronel revolucionario.

programme.title: Santo contra Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina es un gran admirador del campeón El Santo, quien ayuda a la policía en su tiempo libre. Un científico crea un robot idéntico a Capulina para matar a El Santo, y pronto se enfrentan en la arena.

programme.title: El matador
programme.desc: Un asesino a sueldo que recorre el mundo entabla una inesperada amistad con un vendedor tras encontrarse en un bar de hotel en la Ciudad de México.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: El caso Thomas Crown
programme.desc: Thomas Crown (McQueen), un millonario de Boston, un hombre que se ha hecho a sí mismo, se aburre de la vida que lleva. Para huir de la rutina, prepara un golpe perfecto: robar un banco y marcharse después a Brasil.

programme.title: La isla siniestra
programme.desc: En 1954, el alguacil Teddy Daniels investiga la desaparición de un asesino que escapó de un hospital de alta seguridad para enfermos mentales.

programme.title: Mátalos suavemente
programme.desc: Durante la crisis económica de 2008, Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), un sicario, es contratado para restablecer el orden después de que tres idiotas roban una partida de póquer protegida por la mafia.

programme.title: Evelyn (ESP)
programme.desc: Son tiempos difíciles en Dublín, Irlanda. Pero nadie lo tiene más difícil que Desmond Doyle cuando su esposa se marcha y el gobierno decide mandar a su amada hija Evelyn y sus otros dos hijos jóvenes a un orfanato.

programme.title: Lucha de tentaciones
programme.desc: El ganador del Oscar, Cuba Gooding, Jr. interpreta a Darrin Hill, un ejecutivo de Nueva York con mucha labia y poca suerte que regresa a su ciudad natal para cobrar la herencia de su tía. Pero antes, deberá cumplir su última voluntad.

programme.title: Querido Dios
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear protagoniza en este espíritu-levantador sobre un estafador que va de nada bueno al hacer el bien.

programme.title: Casi un ángel
programme.desc: En una experiencia cercana a la muerte, un ladronzuelo tiene un encuentro con Dios y recobra la conciencia creyendo que es un ángel de prueba, que debe realizar buenas obras para conservar su lugar en el cielo.

programme.title: Tan distinto como yo
programme.desc: Del éxito de ventas del NY Times llega una historia inspiradora y verdadera sobre dos hombres de orígenes radicalmente opuestos, que desarrollan un sorprendente vínculo que los llevará al viaje más notable de sus vidas y forjará una amistad eterna.

programme.title: Silencio
programme.desc: Silencio de Martin Scorsese cuenta la historia de dos misioneros que viajan a Japón en búsqueda de su mentor desaparecido en un momento en que el cristianismo estaba prohibido. Cuando son capturados, ambos hombres se sumergen en una peligrosa odisea.

programme.title: Top Gun: "Pasión y gloria"
programme.desc: Tom Cruise es el magnífico Maverick Mitchell, un joven piloto que está dispuesto a ser el mejor. Y Kelly McGillis interpreta al instructor que le enseña a Maverick algunas cosas que no se aprenden en clase.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: bajo la mira
programme.desc: Un investigador de homicidios se adentra en un caso que involucra a un francotirador militar capacitado que disparó a cinco víctimas al azar.

programme.title: Hombres de élite
programme.desc: En este tenso thriller protagonizado por John Travolta y Kate Bosworth, un equipo de trabajadores de líneas eléctricas de Texas se apresura a instalar kilómetros de cable antes de que una mortal tormenta eléctrica destruya la red eléctrica.

programme.desc: Jason Momoa protagoniza este intenso thriller de acción sobre un leñador que lucha por sobrevivir contra los traficantes de drogas que han escondido heroína en su cabaña de caza.

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada
programme.desc: La vida de Jesús en la Palestina ocupada por Roma: su nacimiento en Belén, su infancia en Nazaret, la última cena, la traición de su discípulo Judas, su juicio, crucifixión y posterior resurrección.

programme.title: Noé
programme.desc: Russell Crowe interpreta a Noé, en la historia llena de valor, sacrificio y esperanza. Esta impactante aventura de acción es aclamada como "una de las más inolvidables historias bíblicas llevadas a la pantalla". (Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times).

programme.title: El hijo de Dios
programme.desc: La historia de la vida de Jesús se cuenta desde su humilde nacimiento a través de sus enseñanzas, crucifixión y resurrección final.

programme.desc: Leading a regiment of Kentucky riflemen during the War of 1812, John Wayne is the frontiersman who battles to save his love and his homeland from speculators, after the Battle of New Orleans.

programme.title: Buffalo Girls
programme.desc: Based on Larry McMurtry's best-selling novel which celebrates the bold escapades of Calamity Jane and her illustrious cohorts, as they travel the wild west in search of her long-lost daughter and the west they once knew.

programme.title: Buffalo Girls
programme.desc: Based on Larry McMurtry's best-selling novel which celebrates the bold escapades of Calamity Jane and her illustrious cohorts, as they travel the wild west in search of her long-lost daughter and the west they once knew.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Return Of The Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Guns Of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: A waning director revives his career after discovering a beautiful Spanish dancer and makes her into a Hollywood star. Ava Gardner, Humphrey Bogart and Edmond O’Brien star in this bitter tale of stardom won and wasted from Joseph L. Mankiewicz.

programme.title: The Desperate Hours
programme.desc: Bogart plays an escaped con who has nothing to lose. March is a suburban Everyman who has everything to lose - his family is held hostage by Bogart.

programme.title: We're No Angels
programme.desc: Humphrey Bogart plays one of his rare comedy roles in this jaunty excursion about three convicts - Joseph (Bogart), Albert (Aldo Ray) and Jules (Peter Ustinov) - who are plotting their escape from Devil's Island.

programme.title: Solomon and Sheba (1959)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner as the wise leader and singer of songs, Solomon, who finds his world turned upside down with the appearance of the wily temptress Sheba (Gina Lollobrigida). George Sanders, Marisa Pavan, David Farrar, and Harry Andrews co-star.

programme.title: Seven Samurai
programme.desc: Farmers from a village exploited by bandits hire a veteran samurai for protection, and he gathers six other samurai to join him.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip's first time throwing a party for teenagers is a success...until the record player breaks.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) takes Oliver (Eddie Albert) to Pixley Superior Municipal Court and sues him for non-payment of a vital contract over the little matter of some rain…or lack thereof. Does Mr. Haney know who he's up against? Does Oliver?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Third-Tuesday-of-Every-Month-Culture-Committee of the Every-Other-Wednesday-Afternoon-Discussion-Club decides that Hooterville needs some culture in the form of a symphony orchestra. And Lisa (Eva Gabor) may just know the perfect conductor.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's (Eddie Albert) nephew Charles (Don Edmonds) arrives for a visit, and Oliver is completely shaken up when the boy turns out to be a long-haired, motorcycle-ridin', hippy-dippy type. But, boy, does he know a thing or two about engines.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver dreams of entering his crop in the Corn Festival, but the dreaded Bing Bug invades Hooterville's farms. After learning of his service as a WWII pilot, the locals volunteer him for the perilous task of flying the town's only crop duster.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a lovely, young and successful farmer comes to Oliver (Eddie Albert) for his legal counsel, Lisa (Eva Gabor) quickly becomes jealous of the two spending time together and becomes determined to break up what she sees as a budding romance.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Monroe Brothers show up to fix the Douglas's closet, Lisa learns that Ralph is devastated because her true love has stood her up on another date. Lisa's solution: an intensive, two-day beauty treatment for Ralph…and the barn for Oliver!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) takes to his soap box, delivering fiery, patriotic speeches after getting a bill from the State Farm Unattached Duty Tax for an outrageous $12.03! But no one can figure out why the tax is levied in the first place.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is curious to learn about the book that Oliver (Eddie Albert) is reading. It is the real-life story of pioneers Gus and Etta Thompson. The episode flashes back to the 19th century with Oliver appearing as Gus and Lisa as Etta.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb (Tom Lester) seeks dating advice from the Douglas's after laying eyes on former classmate Betty Jo Bradley from petticoat Junction. Oliver's well-intentioned guidance has mixed results when Eb hilariously misconstrues the advice he's given.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The locals complain that Oliver's penchant for wearing business suits to do farm work is ruining Hooterville's image. Oliver tries to adjust, but the last laugh is on him when Lisa has her dressmaker design Italian him some swanky new overalls.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter turns from a benevolent host into Scrooge when he and Maude host a Christmas Eve party for his employees. Walter is shocked when they announce some changes they have in mind for the future. Walter orders them out of his house.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The Arthur-Vivian love affair comes apart at the seams when Vivian begins to resent Arthur's constant eulogizing of his late wife in every conversation. Maude thinks Arthur's romantic memories of his late wife are perfectly natural.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's flawed liberalism bubbles to the surface once more as she decides it would be a lovely gesture to invite a black child from the ghetto to live with them for two weeks.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Should the contents of a man's wallet be 'off-limits' to his wife? Walter definitely thinks so, and when his wallet accidentally falls out of a drawer, Maude can't resist the temptation to peek at its contents.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The last thing in the world Maude Findlay wants for a birthday gift is a surprise party where the men talk only to the men and the women are left together in another corner -- but that's exactly what Walter gives her.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: In a frantic effort to get Arthur and Vivian married, Maude plans a weekend wedding in wintry New England but the wedding party becomes snowbound in a Vermont train station.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Florida's husband, Henry, gets a promotion which means Florida can quit her job as a housekeeper for the Findlays and be a full-time wife for her own family, but she doesn't know how to break the news to Maude.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter's tax return is being audited and he's worried. Maude is unable to pinpoint her past association with the tax man -- until she sees the tattoo on his arm and remembers him as the sailor who had tried to attack her 31 years ago.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur and his new bride, Vivian, return from their honeymoon to a hostile Maude and Walter. Walter has just lost a bundle on a bad investment tip given to him by Arthur.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Carol is having discipline problems with her son and hesitates to take a short vacation, but Maude assures Carol that all Phillip needs is a little grandmotherly love and affection.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: After a woman asks Archie to put out is cigar, Archie defends his smoking habit. Soon, the Bunker house is locked in a battle of wills after Mike vows he can go without food longer than Archie can abstain from smoking.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie and Edith are all excited and throw a mortgage burning party because they have finally payed off their mortgage. Meanwhile, Mike has completed his graduate classes and begins a fruitless seach for new lodgings.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: In celebration of its first 100 episodes, Henry Fonda hosts a retrospective of the previous episodes and explores the relationships and the characters that make up the Bunker household, via flashbacks.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Henry Fonda continues to host this retrospective look back at the previous 100 episodes that CBS has aired, taking special look at the relationships and characters of Archie, Edith, Mike and Gloria.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie comes home in a great mood, bearing gifts of perfume for Gloria and bubble bath for Edith. However, Edith becomes deeply distrubed to find out Archie won money while playing the horses.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Henry Jefferson seems to be moving away to open up his own cleaning store and Louise and Lionel are planning a going away party. Archie refuses to set foot in the Jefferson's home and George Jefferson refuses to have white people in his home.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mike's former partner returns to San Francisco, but not because of any longing for the good old days. He is back in town to kill the hired gunman who murdered his son years before.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: "Why are firms owned by virtuous Japanese-American Yuhio Muromoto being bombed by a WW2 memorabilia collector? McGarrett tries to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett is caught up in a series of puzzling murders immediately following the death of a famed artist whose estate seems to be the target of a killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A mystery writer examines strange occurrences in experiments with a cryogenics institute. (Cryogenics is the freezing of living material for preservation for future use.)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Luciana Paluzzi plays an international news reporter whose unwillingness to reveal her source for an impending kidnapping creates an international incident involving the Middle East.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Wealthy horsebreeder's body found in cane field, widow says he was buried 4 months prior. McGarrett investigates 2-3 related murders.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Chin Ho Kelly, a longtime member of the Five-O force and friend of McGarrett's, is caught in the middle of an undercover chinatown operation and is killed.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sparta is celebrating their high school's victory at the regional basketball tournament, but the shock of a deadly hit-and-run accident after the game turns their happiness into a nightmare. Detective Tibbs struggles to find the driver responsible.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: While Chief Bill Gillespie is out of town, a series of mysterious fires break out in town. Virgil (Howard Rollins) and the rest of the Sparta police department struggle to find out who is setting these arson fires that soon turn deadly.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When a couple walking their dog in the forest discover a human leg bone, the Sparta police immediately question an eccentric old lady named Adah Boone, known as the Pig Lady, who lives nearby and who everyone believes is a witch.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Detective Tibbs investigates Chief Gillespie's kidnapping, all the signs seem to point to a racially motivated crime, but Virgil and officer Bubba Skinner are convinced that acting Chief Tom Dugan may somehow be involved.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Althea Tibbs is raped by a fellow teacher, the Sparta police find it difficult to get a conviction because the man's loyal wife has given him an alibi. Virgil desperately wants to avenge Althea's assault and is forced to a near-breaking point.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When a young beauty queen contestant, Dina Raines (Diane Almeida), commits suicide, Sparta Police Chief Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) and Virgil Tibbs (Howard Rollins) investigate the background of the contestant and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A woman murders her wealthy, abusive husband with the help of her lover. All appear to be working according to their plan until the initial evidence points to her stepson as the main suspect; however, as more evidence emerges, the focus shifts.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A woman (Dionne Warwick) seeks the Rangers' help in tracking down a hijacked ambulance, which carries her dying granddaughter's donor liver.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker takes a troubled youth (Nicolas Gonzalez) under his wing after the boy's parents die in a tragic accident; Sydney and Gage go undercover as ravers to bust a gang of drug dealers.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Gage finds himself in a deadly situation after accepting a ride from a pair of escaped convicts - one a "thrill killer," the other a victim of a setup.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested in France after becoming unwitting accomplices in an international jewel heist.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver helps a promising young hockey player tone down his aggressive style of play and possibly reclaim his position on Team USA, America's ice hockey team.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is marked for death after stopping the construction of a proposed marina and unknowingly falls in love with the hired killer sent to stop him.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As a favor to a colleague, Dr. Sloan agrees to perform surgery on mafia kingpin Alfred Johnson. A supposed routine heart operation turns into an untimely death for The Don.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dying of gunshot wounds, private investigator Charlie Harper whispers one final cryptic message to Dr. Sloan. Intrigued, Sloan searches for the meaning of the dying man's last words with the aid of Charlie's secretary, Georgia.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Kill 'em with laughter. That's just what Bonnie Valin did when she murdered her husband with nitrous oxide or laughing gas.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Kill 'em with laughter. That's just what Bonnie Valin did when she murdered her husband with nitrous oxide or laughing gas.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's sister Dora is moving to town. She needs a place to stay overnight while her new home is fumigated; however, they soon discover that more than just bugs have been exterminated.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: In a grueling fight that leaves both competitors hospitalized, undefeated boxing legend, Mercury The Heat Jones loses the world middleweight title to Tommy Brackett.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Selected by Bravo Magazine as one of L.A.'s most eligible bachelors, Dr. Jack Stewart isn't aware the honor is dangerous to his health.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amidst the corridors of Community General Hospital, the hit t.v. show The New Healers is shooting their next episode.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Carol and Mike wed and the two sets of siblings merge to one family.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The boys refuse to share their clubhouse with the girls.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Bradys fear they will have to give away Tiger due to Jan’s allergies.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy’s lead role in a school play causes a family crisis.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Alice doesn't think the boys need her as much anymore now that Carol is in the house--so she announces that she is leaving.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia nominates Mike for a Father of the Year award.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Brady kids fight over what to buy with their trading stamps.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike and Carol plan a camping trip for the whole family.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby runs away when he feels underappreciated and unloved.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Carol gets laryngitis right before singing at the Christmas service.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The kids are at each others' throats. The basic cause of the problem is that the house is seemingly too small with six kids sharing two bedrooms and one bathroom.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Bradys comb the neighborhood in search of runaway dog Tiger.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Alex Trebek guest stars when Iola's crush on the "Jeopardy" game show host turns into a bonanza! Mama accompanies Iola to an audition for the show, but Mama not only becomes the contestant but also wins a trip to Hawaii for the entire family.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The Harpers are off to Hawaii for a week filled with frolic, romance, and surprises in the first part of a special two-part episode.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Mama schemes to rid herself of the man she saved from drowning, in the conclusion of a special two-part episode filmed on location in Maui.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Vint and Naomi think about having a baby, Mama decides to show them what it's really like. She babysits a loud child and is tired by the time Vint and Naomi return home.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama and Iola vie for the presidency of the Church Ladies League in a bitterly contested race.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi's boss expects more than she's willing to do for a promotion. When Mama learns of the request, she chases Naomi's boss around until he publicly admits what he asked.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Bubba videos his family for a school project, demonstrating their loudness and rudeness, Mama is excused from organizing a charity event that she didn't want to organize.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama puts Bubba in a bind with his boss when she returns a gift that wasn't meant for her and spends the money buying presents for everyone else in the family.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al and Jefferson become vintage shoe entrepreneurs.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al must brave the department of motor vehicles to renew his driver's license, but discovers that his fate lies in Bud's hands.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: An untimely pimple threatens Kelly's acting career.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Bud is distracted by Marcy's sexy niece.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al refuses to allow breastfeeding in the shoe store.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al's battle against breastfeeding lands him in trouble with the store's owner.

programme.title: Married... With Children

programme.desc: The Venezuelan pianist Gabriela Montero is accompanied by the Youth Orchestra of the Americas conducted by Carlos Miguel Prieto.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a 30-year-old mother fails to report for duty in Virginia, the Army lists her as AWOL. Her family immediately suspects foul play. They embark on a 13-year quest for answers before an eyewitness blows the case wide open.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Nine years after the murders of a mother and her teenage daughters, a wiretapped conversation helps police to crack the case. And the baffling murder of a Virginia woman is solved when human bones are discovered by a geologist in North Carolina.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: When a church deacon is found shot to death it looks like police may have stumbled upon a multi-party murder plot. And, a wife remains a key suspect in her husband's murder case for six years, until she attempts to prove her own innocence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 23-year-old Tonya McKinley is found brutally murdered on New Years Day 1985, a little boy is left motherless. A family must wait 35 years for advancements in forensic science to finally catch a killer using familial DNA.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: It takes nine years and the work of cutting-edge forensic toxicologists to solve the murder of a medical examiner's wife. Then, a determined Alabama sheriff reopens the case of the deaths of two babies, hoping to get their mother to confess.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: March 1984. Jack Kennedy discovers his daughters brutally murdered. Their mother and niece spend their lives keeping the case alive. DNA leads nowhere. 30 years later, an informant gives up a name.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: New DNA technology and the national DNA databank help police hunt down a rapist-killer 11 years after he committed his crimes, and a detective's painstaking recreation of a woman's shooting death proves it wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A killer authors a book about his con-man past that becomes the key to solving a 29-year-old cold case of two high school sweethearts--and three other cold case murders--leading police to believe he could be the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In July 1997, the brutal murder of 19-year-old Tiffany Johnston rocks the small town of Bethany, Oklahoma. DNA points to her killer over a decade later and leads investigators across state lines.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Guns found dumped in a pond help police to solve the 15-year-old murder of Detroit cab company owner. And the rape and murder of an Atlanta TV station receptionist goes cold for 20 years before DNA links a man to the crime.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In the heart of Cajun country, young mother Brenda DuPont is found murdered in her home in May 1988. The initial investigation sputters and turns cold, but her sister Linda vows to solve her murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery fue brutalmente asesinada en su negocio de Illinois. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto fue un robo que salió mal o un asesinato premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Cómo pudo el acosador obtener el código del sistema de seguridad del hogar de la víctima? ¿Cómo pudo robar sus fotografías personales? La policía necesitaba respuestas y las encontraron en el lugar más extraño.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a Nancy Newman y a sus dos hijas que fueron brutalmente asesinadas. La escena del crimen no tiene escasez de pruebas, pero los investigadores no pueden encontrar un vínculo concluyente con su principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un disparo en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros. ¿Pero fue un homicidio o un suicidio? Se necesitaría la experiencia de expertos forenses y dos juicios con jurado para determinar el destino del asesino acusado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El sospechoso principal tenía un historial criminal y su licencia de conducir se encontró en la escena del crimen de un brutal homicidio doble.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas reveladoras
programme.desc: La desaparición de la atleta universitaria de Filadelfia, Aimee Willard, es investigada después de que su carro fuera encontrado al costado de la carretera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Rhoda Nathan fue encontrada asesinada en una habitación de un hotel en Cincinnati.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vacaciones familiares se convierten en una pesadilla cuando a una mujer la encuentran boca abajo en un lago.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la respuesta de emergencia de Illinois atendió un incendio en un garaje y se encontró a un hombre aplastado debajo de un camión.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The first-year hopefuls get new looks on Rookie Makeover Day, DCC alumni give the candidates feedback, and Cowboys' Head Coach Jason Garrett stops by during a rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Before Kelli and Judy make roster cuts, the rookies learn the famed kickline and jump splits, get fitted for the iconic uniform and face Jay Johnson's power squad training.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A veterinary technician chases her dream, Kelli has an uncomfortable conversation about an applicant's weight, and the women explore their new city.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Some candidates struggle to adapt to the larger stage when they finally hit the field to learn the DCC entrance, and Miranda is unnerved by criticism of her hair.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dark Shadows

programme.desc: Guilt-ridden over Sarah’s death, Barnabas tries to persuade Ben to drive a stake through his heart.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Angelique’s ghost taunts Ben, stating that the curse she placed on Barnabas must continue forever.

programme.desc: Josette is drawn to secretly meet with Barnabas, who tries to resist baring his fangs to bite her.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Barnabas informs Josette they must stay apart forever. Suki Forbes arrives in Collinsport.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Joshua goes to the tomb where he buried Barnabas and discovers that his coffin is now empty.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Suki discovers what Barnabas is and divulges his secret to Nathan before she dies.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Joshua and Naomi fear Josette will die the next day as recorded in the Collins family history book.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Josette is beckoned by Angelique to Widows' Hill, where she sees a terrifying vision of herself.

programme.desc: Joshua goes to the mausoleum and finds that the coffin now contains the body of Barnabas.

programme.desc: Peter must hide the Collins family history book for fear it will be used against Victoria.

programme.desc: Flavor Flav knows everyone who's anyone in the hip hop industry and today he wants to have them all over to his house.

programme.desc: Just like last season, Flav has invited a special guest from his past to help give him input on his selection of ladies.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Boxin' Each Other Out

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Steppin' Out Flav Style

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Oh No She Didn't! (Clip Show)
programme.desc: A lot of incredible stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls' arrived.

programme.desc: Bret wants a girl with good manual skills so he tests their aptitude with nuts and bolts in a custom motorcycle build off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Mia is offered a MAJOR modeling contract in Paris, Peter decides he’ll go with her. But he soon realizes he doesn’t fit into her sophisticated world.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Peter discovers his recreational drug was not-so-recreational meth, he swears he’ll never touch the stuff again. But with the reality of coming down, Peter realizes he just wants more.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Club Fair Day and Alli and Clare sign up for the Photography Club. Watch out Annie Leibovitz! Everyone who’s anyone is getting involved in something – except Johnny.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Spinner have been through so much together. They’re best friends. Jane’s just come out of a difficult year at home, so hanging out with Spinner is safe and… easy. That’s not a bad thing, right?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli insists she’s done with Johnny. When she breaks into his locker to steal nude photos of herself back, she, in fact, realizes that she’s so not over him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Holly J team up for a practicum business assignment and immediately bond over their idea to start a babysitting agency.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Matchmaker week at Degrassi and Declan’s not interested in a serious relationship. The Diplomat brat is here for a good time, not a long time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Against all odds, Holly J has fallen for Declan. Suddenly she gets what everyone’s been so excited about for so long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s living the high school dream. The basketball team made it to the provincial finals, the Sports Awards Gala is coming up, and he finally has a mentor who gets him – Coach Carson.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s life is on the fast track. With the final basketball game approaching, the pressure is at an all-time high and Coach Carson has really taken KC under his wing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma and Kelly make a pit stop at Degrassi while on their Cross Country Bike Adventure raising awareness for their Re-Cycle project. Combining the great outdoors with her sexy boyfriend, Emma’s convinced she’s destined for the best summer ever.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s been a tough year for Peter. Mia’s departure, a brief meth problem, and the serious downgrade from lead singer to roadie.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya have been planning for their Spring Formal for as long as they can remember. It’s going to be magical.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Anya is more determined than ever to convince Sav they should be together – even if he is bringing family-friend and arranged-marriage-bride Farrah to the Spring Formal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Post-KC, Clare’s social life consists of building props for Declan’s musical and reading every book in the “Fortnight” vampire series. But when Clare has a sexy vampire dream about Declan, she’s shocked by her inner fantasy life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s completed anger management and has been named ‘Degrassi’s most eligible bachelor’. He’s been keeping his true feelings about guys under wraps – but he’s not sure he wants to anymore.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Holly J and Declan are closer than ever. They’ve made it through the year, Holly J’s applied for internships all over the city, and with exams almost done, all they need to worry about is Declan’s musical.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisation's religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: From the statues of Rameses II to the final flourishes under Queen Cleopatra, Sooke discovers that the subsequent invasions by foreign rulers, from the Nubians and Alexander the Great to the Romans, produced a new hybrid art full of surprise.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids
programme.desc: Exploring fresh archaeological excavations that shed new light on the lives of those who worked tirelessly on the pyramids.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Labrador mix with dog aggression; a Jack Russell terrier and a Queensland heeler whose formerly cordial relationship has become hostile.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dogo Argentino with canine aggression; a terrier/corgi mix who becomes aggressive when faced with traveling.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Mufasa, a South African boerboel, became aggressive after being pinned down by another dog; Tucker, a teacup poodle, behavior becomes more aggressive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors, but instead of hunting for treats, they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender, with a long record, ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.desc: When a police detective accidentally shoots an innocent child, a community is thrown into racial turmoil.

programme.desc: When Monica and Andrew throw a surprise party for Tess, there's one problem -- they can't find their guest of honor.

programme.title: Merantau
programme.desc: Leaving the simple life in rural West Sumatera, Yuda must undergo merantau, the traditional rite of passage in which a young man must leave his family’s home to make it on his own.

programme.title: The Raid: Redemption
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Jakarta's slums lies a drug-gang’s safe house, home to some of the most terrifying and ruthless fighters in the city. Arriving before dawn, an elite swat team moves in to take down the notorious drug lord that runs it.

programme.title: The Raid 2 (Subtitled)
programme.desc: Following immediately after the events of THE RAID, Rama (Iko Uwais) is forced to reinvent himself as an undercover cop in order to provide protection for his wife and child.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: When kickboxing champ Eric Sloane is crippled in the ring by the evil Tong Po, Eric's younger brother, Kurt, seeks vengeance.

programme.title: Kickboxer 2: The Road Back
programme.desc: In this rousing sequel to Kickboxer, Tong Po broods about his defeat at the hands of Kurt Sloan. Po and his managers resort to drastic measures to goad Kurt into the ring for a rematch.

programme.title: Kickboxer 4: The Aggressor
programme.desc: David Sloan is on a mission to free his wife who has been enslaved by an evil world champion, Tong Po. He attempts to gain entry into Po’s savage kingdom by fighting in the tournament of champions where the winner takes all.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Maine resident Pearl Smith goes missing after an argument with her husband, Bill Bruns. When investigators find a blood trail that leads to the couple's basement, police are sure they'll find the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When Billy gets a "B" on a test instead of his usual "A," he fears he will not make The Young Scientists of America club.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy team up to teach a self-defense class to middle-aged women. Bulk and Skull join the class -- thinking that it will be an opportunity to meet "babes."

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Bulk and Skull make a nuisance of themselves by attempting to juggle balls at a party for a group of kids, but Zack manages to scare them off with a pair of rubber snakes. An impressed Angela gives Zack a peck on the cheek.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Boston, agentes del FBI y la policía local rastrearon a una banda de ladrones que se especializaban en el desmantelamiento de vehículos blindados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1987, un oficial de policía de Boston que respondió a una llamada por un altercado doméstico fue herido de muerte. Las autoridades hicieron una persecución a lo largo de la ciudad, pero solo pudieron encontrar las huellas del sospechoso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1986, la pequeña ciudad sin crímenes de Indiana se tornó violenta por la llegada de un extraño muy peligroso. Después de que un oficial fuera baleado a quemarropa, el asesino psicótico llevó a los investigadores a través del Medio Oeste.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El robo a un camión blindado en Nueva York en 1981 dejó a un guardia muerto y a otro herido de gravedad. La policía detuvo a unos sospechosos en las cercanías y se produjo otra balacera que costó las vidas de dos oficiales.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Las violaciones y asesinatos de diez mujeres cerca de Tampa, Florida, en 1984, tenía desconcertadas a las autoridades y asustada a la comunidad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un día que comenzó con un paseo escolar al campo terminó con la peor pesadilla para los padres. Una niña de once años había desaparecido. Sus padres estaban seguros de que no se trataba de una huida.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando los criminales violentos atacan, el FBI contraataca: emplea cada recurso disponible y, de ser necesario, crea otros.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1993, un ladrón sorprendió a clientes desprevenidos al descender por el techo de un banco de California. Cuando la policía llegó, escapó por el mismo lugar en medio de una balacera.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En enero de 1984, un oficial de aduanas desaparece de su puesto cerca de del río en el cruce de la frontera con Texas, incitando a la policía local a buscar a cuatro sospechosos latinoamericano. Al día siguiente, el oficial de aduanas fue hallado muerto.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1996, dos hombres entraron en una casa de empeño en Birmingham, Alabama, y asesinaron sin piedad a los empleados. Para desconocimiento de los asesinos, una cámara secreta de vigilancia grabó el tiroteo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Nueva York, el FBI y la policía local unieron fuerzas para combatir el ingreso constante de cocaína de Colombia por los puertos de la ciudad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un cuerpo en llamas en un callejón oscuro arroja luz sobre un asesino. Sus compañeros en el crimen contarían la historia, si hubieran sobrevivido.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Comenzando en California en 1995, un asesino en serie atacó a varias mujeres vulnerables. Al principio, se mostraba encantador y generoso, y con rapidez se tornaba violento. Era despiadado en sus crímenes y rápido en sus escapes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el verano de 1999, Texas fue aterrorizada por un asesino en serie que viajaba en tren. El FBI organizó una fuerza de tareas para reunir información sobre el viajero peligroso y crear un perfil que ayudara a localizarlo.

programme.desc: While Betty and X-5 are waiting for Sparky to finish using the bathroom after ingesting too many montegoberries, Sparky finds a set of bongo drums at a yard sale,.

programme.desc: In space, a small gnarly imp-like creature named Jinx steals all of the galaxy's good luck, leaving nothing but bad luck in his wake. On Earth, Betty is concerned Penelope and Paloma may be becoming friends.

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus infects Betty with a love bug, and she instantly falls in love with Minimus. The bug's hitch a ride back to Earth, and the whole town erupts in Valentine's Day madness!

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: It is Betty's thirteenth birthday, and Betty's family and friends are arranging a surprise birthday party. Meanwhile, after years of work, X-5 has managed to complete a working time machine.

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Oni in Ninjago City are stronger than anyone could have imagined, and the ninja must risk a daring rescue of Lloyd and Garmadon. Though there is still a slight hope, one ninja will pay a terrible price.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wake of their previous victory, the ninja go soft and Master Wu must remind them of who they truly are.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Realizing they have gone soft, the ninjas search for a quest to reignite their Spinjitzu training; unfortunately, Ninjago City is enjoying a period of rare tranquility.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas have found their quest. Now they just have to get there, which involves a road trip through the Desert of Doom, a region supposedly inhabited by a giant scarab beetle.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: To repair the Land-Bounty, the ninjas must retrieve a critical engine component that has been swallowed by a giant scarab beetle.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas team up with a reluctant Clutch Powers to enter a mysterious pyramid where they inadvertently unleash an ancient evil.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lil' Nelson takes a job as a paperboy, which is more difficult than it sounds in a city overrun by scorching Pyro Vipers and an evil Serpentine sorceress.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas find themselves trapped in a pyramid and must escape encroaching lava to warn Ninjago City of a new Serpentine invasion.

programme.desc: While Aspheera pursues revenge on the "Treacherous Deceiver" who betrayed her, the ninja make a startling discovery.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
