programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya, Jay, Cole and Kai face off against the Ice Emperor's dreaded dragon, while Lloyd and his newfound allies, Kataru and Grimfax, confront the Ice Emperor himself.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The dramatic conclusion of the Never-Realm saga, in which old friends are reunited and the power of friendship is pitted against the corrupting power of the Scroll of Forbidden Spinjitzu.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: While investigating a heist, the ninja discover Prime Empire, an unreleased arcade game that suddenly takes control of all other games in Ninjago

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: When the ninja connect Jay's disappearance to Prime Empire, they set out to Dyer Island to seek answers from the game's designer, Milton Dyer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cyrus Borg discovers a secret about Prime Empire while the ninja battle an escaped Mechanic in an attempt to reach Level Thirteen and enter the game.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Inside Prime Empire, the ninja are in unfamiliar territory, ignorant of the rules, as they try to find Zane and escape Unagami's Red Visors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Inside one of the game zones, a Samurai named Okino faces a crisis of faith when he fails to lead a series of Masters to victory.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: In order to stop Unagami, the ninja must obtain 3 Key-tanas, the first of which is hidden in Terra Karana–one of the most dangerous game environments.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja climb the 'Cliffs of Hysteria and discover that Unagami is converting players into energy cubes to build a portal into the real world.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Still in the game zone Terra Karana, Okino has to choose between helping his allies the ninja, or obeying the evil orders of his Master, Unagami.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja learn that the only way to acquire the 2nd Key-tana is by winning a race in Terra Technica and have to find racing cars in unexpected ways

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: As the ninja prepare for the brutal Speedway Five-Billion race, Lloyd meets a race driver named Seven who may hold the key to victory.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Unagami's soldiers, the Red Visors, finally discover the secret location of Scott's garage and attack the ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Our ninja barely have time to mourn the loss of their fallen ninja friends before being thrust into the madness of Terra Domina.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago City, Zane and Pixal hit the mean streets to track down Milton Dyer, only to discover that things are not what they seem...

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Zane, kidnapped by the Mechanic, faces Unagami while Pixal questions Milton Dyer for information on how to shut down Prime Empire.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Jay must stand alone against Unagami in the end-game, yet Unagami has a bigger battle in facing the truth about his own identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Unagami breaks into the real world and terrorizes Ninjago City while Jay, Zane and Pixal attempt to prevent disaster by reuniting Unagami with Dyer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja are invited to attend the birthday party of Princess Vania in the Kingdom of Shintaro. They bring along Master Wu who is feeling his age.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Princess Vania reveals a secret entrance that leads to an underground mine beneath Shintaro where the city's dark secrets are held.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja attempt to rescue Cole, but the bickering of his fellow prisoners alerts the Skull Sorcerer, and soon the ninja are prisoners too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: In order to escape the Skull Sorcerer's chain-gang, the ninja must convince the Munce and Geckles to put aside their distrust and work together.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Jay, Nya and Lloyd are led into the Mines of Shintaro by Murt who brings them back to the Munce "Home-Cave". The Munce Queen takes a liking to Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: A party of Geckles suspect Kai and Zane of being in league with the Skull Sorcerer and bring them to their leader who subjects them to a Trial-By-Mino

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Separated from the others, Cole must find his way to the surface to alert King Vangelis of the dangerous Skull Sorcerer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: An entire episode chronicles how Cole, Princess Vania and Master Wu fall down a seemingly endless tunnel, into the bowels of Shintaro Mountain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, Wu and Princess Vania befriend a motley group of survivors, called the Lowly, and are told the story of how they too ended up at "Rock-Bottom."

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Having joined forces with the Lowly in their quest to defeat King Vangelis, Cole, Wu, and Vania have to find a way out of the bottom of the mountain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Nya and Kai, who have become the leaders of the Munce and Geckles, try to unite the tribes and defeat their mutual enemy, the Skull Sorcerer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, Princess Vania, Wu & the Lowly arrive at a temple in Shintaro Mountain which was once a training ground for Earth Elementals incl. Cole's mother

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A judge maintains her husband's innocence after a botched murder attempt leaves her mortally wounded.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe, resentful at being second-guessed by fellow officers, feuds with Green over an exasperating murder case.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Even with key DNA evidence, a new witness jeopardizes the conviction of a man suspected of bludgeoning a woman into a coma.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think a life insurance salesman's valuable information about his policies was a motive for his murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green track a gigolo and con artist who is suspected of murder, but they run into problems when McCoy and Carmichael interview a victim's family.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a teenager is found murdered, Detectives Briscoe and Green suspect a school bully who displays an avid interest in martial-arts weapons.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A mentally disturbed suspect refuses to take his antidepressant medicine, rendering him incapable of standing trial for murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The parents of a missing child accuse each other of having the baby until a gruesome discovery is made.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe a possible love triangle was the motive behind the attempted assassination of a best-selling author.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives continue searching for a shooter who may be responsible for several unsolved murders years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy has trouble holding a case against a teenager's boyfriend suspected of killing two girls when she refuses to talk about his abuse.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a stockbroker points to organized crime when the prime suspect is killed by a hired hit man.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Carmichael find two patrolmen partially responsible for the killing of a white teenager in Harlem.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a bomb kills six on a helicopter flight, evidence points to a victim's wife who is influenced by two financial advisers (Annette O'Toole, Michael McKean).

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La Bebeshita busca a Queen para hablar, pero tambien para desgreñarla. En un barco pirata, Queen le promete amor a Fano mientras que en la Villa le espera un fantasma del pasado. Dos EX deben regresar al mar por culpa de la Sala Tornado.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Las peleas en la Villa no cesan. Asaf prueba más labios y el corazon de Lilian se parte. Más Ex se van mientras que la ultima en llegar, espera en la Love Suite. La Sala Tornado llama a Brandon y repite la historia, pero ahora con Queen.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana amenaza a Frida tras su nuevo romance con Brandon. La Sala Tornado abre sus puertas y eligen a ciegas quién es el próximo EX en llegar. Suavecito sufre por el romance de Kim e Ian.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban y Aylin comienzan un romance. La llegada del nuevo EX sorprende a todos y la Tablet los manda a una cita de tres. La Sala Tornado pone las cartas sobre la mesa. Brandon toma una decisión importante.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban busca hacer un trío y Aylin busca exclusividad. Llega un nuevo EX y hace que Frida respire de nuevo. Diana esta insegura de Brandon. Kelly es mas territorial con Robbie por culpa de Michelle.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben defends a flashy rock star against charges of murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Three high fashion cover girls are suspects in the death of a powerful agent who was stabbed to death in a famous photographer’s darkroom. Ben Matlock takes the case at the insistence of his investigator, Conrad McMasters.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock defends a renowned journalist accused of murdering a beautiful international model. Matlock’s investigation is stalled when he is struck by a car and lands in the hospital with a slight case of amnesia.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Julie March becomes Ben Matlock’s houseguest at an inopportune time in their relationship. Julie is the prosecuting attorney in a murder case that has Ben defending dance instructor Scott Lazar for the hit-and-run death of his benefactor – and lover.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is confronted with a dilemma. He knows his client, Phyllis Todd, is innocent of murder, but he strongly suspects she has allowed herself to be accused of the crime to protect her daughter.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: An arsonist is about to torch Matlock’s favorite men’s store and one of the owners will become Matlock’s next case after his partner is murdered.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock serves double duty: defending Brian Emerson, who’s charged with killing his ex-wife, and babysitting Emerson’s 6-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A craving for a down-home barbecue in the inner city leads Matlock into a dangerous situation. After his car breaks down, he’s mugged at knifepoint. Even his barbecue dinner is stolen! However; one good samaritan, Stan Johnson, comes to his aid.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When a member of the Law Club disappears, it becomes apparent that each of the students in Matlock's law class had a motive. Matlock wonders if he taught someone how to commit the perfect crime, and sets out to discover if it really was.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock must break a seemingly perfect defense when Arthur Hampton, a blind sculptor, shoots the man responsible for his loss of sight. After waiting many years, Hampton finally takes his revenge on Clay Graham, the playboy responsible for his blindness.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is kidnapped and threatened by an unknown person, or persons, who may be seeking revenge for sending them to prison.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Judge Carter Addison murders his cheating mistress and frames her lover. Then the judge presides over the man's trial with Ben Matlock as the defense counsel.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A phony story is planted on the nightly news when a corrupt land developer pays off the on-air talent but when the producer fakes his own death, the anchorwoman unwittingly helps him along, never realizing it’s somebody else she killed.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Hired to defend an innocent newscaster, Matlock is baffled until evidence turns up that puts him on the trail of the real killer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The DeQuettevilles and the Fleetwoods have been enemies since the English Civil War. Now, the DeQuettevilles are dying after seeing a headless horseman. Is the ancient feud to blame?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a barrister is killed, suspicion falls on convicted killer Grady Felton. Barnaby suspects he is working with an accomplice – until Grady himself is targeted in an arson attack.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A film historian writing about a 1960s horror actress is killed in her home. It becomes the start of what appear to be a series of copycat murders based on the actress' films.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: During a total eclipse of the sun, an astronomer is bludgeoned to death by a meteor, and an astrologer claims to have predicted each subsequent murder.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a young girl wakes up from a mysterious coma, she finds that no one knows what happened to her boyfriend who disappeared around the same time she was attacked.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: At the factory where the world-famous Midsomer Blue Cheese is made, a dairy worker is brutally murdered by a giant round of weaponized cheese.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and his new partner, D.S. Nelson (Gwilym Lee, "Jamestown"), investigate the fatal stabbing of a man with an antique sword during a ghost-hunting party at a manor house.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A series of murders in Midsomer St Claire seems to be inspired by macabre images on a medieval fresco recently discovered in the church crypt.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the landlord of Wyvern House meets a brutal and untimely death in his own woods, many aspersions are cast.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan and Luis host a dinner party to sell their listing but struggle to rein in Ramona Singer; Fredrik's listing isn't big enough to satisfy his buyer's needs, so he tries to sell her a different unit, even if it's one he doesn't represent.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan lists a unique $18 million townhouse with commercial space; Tyler gears up to sell his biggest listing ever; Steve snags a listing but must work to attract attention for this hidden gem; Kirsten comes in hot as the new broker on the block.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik catwalks his way to a potential deal with a former supermodel; Ryan hopes to make a splash at his open house; Tyler battles to sell the biggest listing of his career; KJ hosts a sparkling aperitivo to court interest from expats.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan suits up to sell designer Marc Jacobs' swanky West Village townhouse; KJ brings in an interested buyer; Steve whets the appetite with a tasty open house; Tyler is challenged to sell a property across from a police and fire station.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan scores a two-for-one property with a hidden apartment; Steve seals the deal on a historical property in NYC's beloved Ansonia building; KJ is faced with closing the Townhouse in the Sky, but she struggles to make her toughest client happy.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan attempts to woo the hard-to-get developer of his dreams; things heat up at Tyler's fireman open house; KJ breaks down when a threat looms.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: The agents document their lives in lockdown, they learn how to navigate a new world; a fleeing New Yorker tasks Tyler with selling her flamboyantly Floridian apartment; Ryan brings on a team member; Fredrik encounters some glitches.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: As New Yorkers return to the city, Ryan reveals major news; Steve unveils his impressive renovation at the iconic Ansonia; stuck in LA, Fred experiments with a robot-driven private showing; Tyler navigates a Southern Belle with seller's remorse.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Tyler heads to Harlem to sell a huge family home; Kemba and Tyler throw a psychic-themed Open House; Ryan sets up tours which feature a Lamborghini; Steve invites New York City socialite Dorinda Medley to help spread the word about Wiltsie.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: As real estate outside Manhattan continues to explode, KJ returns to her hometown of Rye, N.Y., for a coveted listing and secures the help of her interior designer mom to bring in potential buyers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik is assigned a live-in sale situation for a $15 million luxury penthouse; inspired by his friend in the Berkshires, Dorinda Medley, Steve stages a splashy open house at his upstate farm and invites an unimpressed KJ to take a walk in the mud.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Team Serhant hosts private showings with an Australian buyer who has never visited New York but is willing to purchase property over FaceTime if Ryan can meet his demands; the virtual showings take them across the city to one of KJ's listings.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik is inspired to find a new shelter for homeless LGBTQ+ teens; Tyler campaigns to sell an Upper West Side townhouse by banking on some personal ties; KJ enlists the help of her younger brother, Alex, in the hopes of attracting younger buyers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Steve discovers Ryan may have a potential client for one of the few available units; Ryan's patience is tested by a virtual buyer with a long list of apartment needs and a limited knowledge of the city; KJ lands a prestigious power listing.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: In the country of Valeria, the IMF must assure that the corrupt Nationalist party's rigged voting machine doesn't give them the election.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Mobster Frank Egan kidnaps the daughter of Dan's friend and uses her as a hostage to force Dan and the team to break out a key witness, Augie Gorman, against him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Rollin and Cinnamon go it alone to recover a reel of recording wire containing information on a chemical warfare project aimed at the U.S.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Enemy agent Janos Passik is preparing to train 200 foreign agents to infiltrate the U.S. and engage in some form of bacteriological warfare.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The wife of a deceased scientist, Kurt Zubrovnik, is being pressured by Eastern forces to work for them.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Anastas Poltroni is the head of an international narcotics syndicate, and has taken refuge in a country with no extradition treaty. The IM Force is assigned to lure him out.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Double-agent Elena Del Barra is acting bizarrely, sending a microfilm of defense secrets from her own country. Rollin is sent in to investigate and return the microfilm without its theft ever being detected.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A defector has been targeted by two rival groups from the same foreign country. The team is to discredit the younger group, so that the U.S. can more easily handle the old-line group.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF must get hold of a hoard of Nazi gold through four young men, sons of Hitler's top aides, who are sent to Switzerland to meet for the first time and pool their parts of the "puzzle" together.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dr. Cherlotov, a scientist of an enemy power, failed to defect to the West when his wife did. Now that he has developed a cheap, effective anti-ballistic system, the IMF is ordered to get him out.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Gangster Jack Wellman is moving syndicated crime into politics, killing off certain politicians and replacing them with men more sympathetic to the Syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Josef Varsh plans to put an American on trial on false charges, discredit the West, and gain power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Henrik Durvard has taken over the country of Lombuanada by a military coup, and holds the natives in terror. He has obtained a diamond from the native miners, and the IMF is assigned to take it away from him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An imprisoned member of the Nazi party, Herbert Raynor, is released from prison and is being flown to Puerto Huberra in South America, along with other Nazis.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Riding their bicycles to the Scanlons' home, Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely discover that the house is built into the side of a hill. Mr. McFeely has a sand delivery that Mayor Maggie may have ordered for a secret project in Westwood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers follows a scavenger hunt that leads to balloon artist, Bruce Franco. Lady Aberlin has a balloon and King Friday wonders what would happen if the air went out of it. Lady Aberlin encourages him to enjoy it and not worry.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers writes with invisible ink. Mr. McFeely delivers a heavy marble statue. Lady Elaine Fairchilde looks forward to her marriage to Neighbor Aber while Ana Platypus says that she is going to marry Daniel Striped Tiger.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats narrowly defeat a robot that resembles one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea. But before the dust settles on the field of battle, a far deadlier foe comes looking for a fight.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro's barely breathing, and Admiral Kizaru is ready to stomp him into oblivion. The battered and beaten Straw Hats could certainly use a powerful friend right about now.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One by one, the mighty paw-print of Bartholomew Kuma makes the Straw Hats disappear until only Luffy remains. To where did his mates vanish? And will he ever see them again?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yesterday, the Straw Hats valiantly battled a Warlord of the Sea. Today, Boss Luffy and his friends at the Pinwheel Diner prepare to compete in the Great Portable Shrine Race!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thriller Company sabotages the race for a sacred treasure, and the displaced Straw Hats must pull an all-nighter to rebuild their shrine and score some ancient gold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finds himself stranded and starving on a strange island. The rubber-man's amazing appetite puts his manhood in danger when he devours an array of exotic mushrooms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An army of scantily-clad women warriors want to investigate Luffy's family jewels, but the captain of the Straw Hats is more interested in reuniting with his lost mates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The women chasing Luffy are loyal subjects of Boa Hancock, the curvaceous Warlord of the Sea. This stone-cold beauty is deadly, and she's about to pick a fight with an entire fleet of marines!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's search for a seaworthy vessel leads to a "drop-in" on the Snake Princess during the royal bathing hour. The view is world-class, but it might turn the rubber-man to stone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock makes Luffy mad when she turns Margaret into a statue. The Snake Princess may have bitten off more than she can chew by challenging the captain of the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Snake Princess pits Luffy's Gum-Gum abilities against the incredible Haki power of her serpentine sisters in a fight to the death. Will Luffy survive long enough to save his statuesque friends?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks his attack mode into Second Gear to save a precious statue, and the snake sisters start to feel the Straw Hat heat. At the battle's climax, Luffy makes an impression on his opponents.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: News of Luffy's run-in with the Celestial Dragons impresses the Snake Princess, so she tells him the story of her tortured past. Will his honorable nature speed Luffy toward a reunion with his crew?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is mobbed by a hoard of pretty Kuja women eager to touch a real live man. Granny Nyon offers him a safe haven, but what she has to say might sink his plans for a Straw Hat reunion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock's illness threatens to sabotage Luffy's rescue mission. However, the Snake Princess just can't say "no" to the rubber-man, so a plan to save Ace is quickly hatched.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy races to save Ace, Nami tries to survive life on Sky Island, and Franky dances up a snowstorm before making the switch from cola to tea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper narrowly avoids being served for dinner in a land inhabited by giant birds, and Sanji's refined tastes land him a role as a leading lady on the island of girlish hearts.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico Robin finds herself trapped on the island of Tequila Wolf: a miserable land where children are forced to work as slaves. Elsewhere, Usopp tries to survive a run-in with a man-eating plant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is held against his will by the pink-haired princess of bad vibes, Brook gets mistaken for the king of darkness, and Luffy continues to eat his way toward a reunion with Fire-Fist Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Boa arrive at Impel Down, but only thirty-three hours remain until Ace's execution. To save him, the Snake Princess must find a way to hide Luffy during her full-body search!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Time is running out on Ace, so Luffy teams up with a scoundrel who's going to pieces trying to escape Impel Down. There's no love lost between the former foes, but they'd better work together if they want to survive.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must part ways with a priceless treasure map before Buggy the Clown agrees to lead him through the bloody tangle of Blade Trees and Spike Needle Grass that make up Impel Down's Crimson Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Buggy the Clown could end up as hippo food if they aren't careful in Impel Down's Wild Beast Hell. Of course, the rubber-man might find that a better fate than dealing with the prison's putrid warden!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stumble upon a most peculiar village when they hitch a ride on a fire-breathing beetle. The natives are petrified of pirates, but they welcome the Straw Hats with open arms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The citizens of Little East Blue throw in a feast in honor of the Straw Hats, but when the Amigo Pirates try to capture Boss the Beetle, Luffy and his crew will have to defend their new friends.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji prepare to do battle on behalf of Boss the Beetle, but Captain Largo of the Amigo Pirates counters with a deadly arsenal of nets to put the Straw Hat brawlers on lock down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks into Second Gear for his rematch with Largo, and Nami leads the islanders as they lay waste to the Amigo Pirates. Boss the Beetle may be safe for now, but someone sinister lurks behind the scenes.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a 4-year-old finds his great-grandparents melted, he runs for help, launching an investigation into their double murder; greed takes center stage as detectives unwind this heart-wrenching case that leads them to a suspect no one saw coming.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman disappears, leaving the community hoping for her safe return; when she is found murdered, a string of mysterious anonymous tips takes detectives into a toxic world of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A missing persons case becomes something much darker when a sick, sinister affair is uncovered, leading investigators to believe foul play is involved.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The mysterious shooting of a restaurateur with no solid suspects and no murder weapon leaves detectives in a lurch, but when financial motives come to light, an undercover operation and clever forensic investigation turn the case upside-down.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A military veteran is missing, and a young student is murdered in what appears to be a crime of passion, but the discovery of a secret payout leads police on a wild chase.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Passions and obsessions turn toxic when a beautiful young law student is found murdered and left in a trash can, leaving police to decipher a web of boyfriends, exes and unrequited lovers.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The wife of a Marine, a pregnant dominatrix and a sex slave cross paths in a twisted tale of kidnapping, lies and murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mom does all she can to provide for her kids, including taking up with five sugar daddies to make ends meet, but when jealousy rears its ugly head, this mom winds up dead and her killer is not who you would expect.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: To keep their marriage fresh, a young couple turns to a life of sex games and sharing spouses, but when threesomes and foursomes lead to murder, investigators struggle to prove who killed this swinger.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A lover's quarrel and a quick cash scheme lead to the murder of a happy retiree; the Hollywood community is stunned when a body is found under its most famous landmark.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother becomes a murder victim while living a double life; a web of deception, sex and murder sends detectives on a multi-year hunt to figure out who could have murdered her.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A high-speed car chase ends with a 40-year-old newlywed shot dead in front of her husband and stepdaughter; is this a robbery gone wrong, a gang ordered hit, or something more sinister.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The quintessential girl next door is discovered brutally killed on Thanksgiving weekend; it would take investigators over a year to uncover the dark obsession that led to her murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A foursome, a stripper, and a biker, is just the beginning for investigators of this massage table homicide; everyone is shocked as a secret fetish for murder is revealed.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found shot and stabbed in her kitchen; multiple suspects emerge, but the true mastermind of this murder hits closer to home than anyone expected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What started as a perfect marriage evolves into a threesome; after one of the participants winds up dead, the killer turns out to be someone the investigators never suspected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a psychic and her adult daughter are found killed under bizarre circumstances, the list of suspects grows long as investigators discover that male escorts, blackmail, fraud and love spells all played a part in this chilling double murder.

programme.desc: A seemingly harmless orb from a dead world is brought back to the base through the Stargate, but the strange device infects O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) with an alien organism. Now, the only chance to save him is to let the organism control him!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 goes on a mission to rescue Teal'c's son, Rya'c, from the grasp of Apophis. But, when they finally reach Rya'c, he doesn't want to be saved -- he's been brainwashed and has accepted Apophis as his god! Can Teal'c find a way to win back his son?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Stargate project is imperiled when a reporter threatens to expose the top-secret portal. O'Neill attempts to stop him while the rest of the team tries to save Jackson's wife who has been impregnated with a Goa'uld. Is this the end of Stargate?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A giant insect has bitten Teal'c (Christopher Judge) and soon his body will transform into a cocoon and give birth to hundreds of insect aliens. Can the SG-1 team capture one of the bugs, extract the venom and save Teal'c before it's too late?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Captain Carter unwillingly becomes the host to a dying Tok'ra, a member of the resistance whose noble goal is to overthrow the evil Goa'uld empire. Now she sees through the Tok'ra's eyes, but can her visions help the SG-1 team save the Tok'ra?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Tok'ra are desperate for hosts so they can continue fighting the Goa'uld. Carter's father, who is dying of cancer, has nothing to lose by volunteering his body. But will he die during the transference...or does fate have something else in store?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-11 vanishes while negotiating the mining rights on a planet inhabited by a tribe known as the Salish. Can the SG-1 team find their lost colleagues without angering the planet's mystical spirits...or will they become their next victims?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A climate-controlling touchstone is stolen from planet Madrona, causing the weather to rapidly deteriorate. And when the SG-1 team is accused of the theft, O'Neill must pursue the real thief and rescue the missing stone before Madrona perishes.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: While studying alien wall inscriptions on another planet, O'Neill peers into a viewer that unleashes ancient knowledge into his mind like computer virus. Can the SG-1 team reverse the process before his mind is completely reconfigured.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A black hole swallows the SG-10 team, and O'Neill is sent on a rescue mission. As the hole's pull grows stronger, it draws the Stargate toward it and soon threatens to destroy Earth. Will O'Neill find a way to stop this super-destructive force?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Jackson's body is swapped with that of an old Goa'uld enemy. As Jackson lies dying in the alien's ancient body, O'Neill and Teal'c accidentally switch forms too, and unless the alien is captured, all will be trapped in their new bodies forever!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1's arch-enemy Apophis is dying and seeks sanctuary with O'Neill. But what he really wants is a new host in exchange for his knowledge of the Goa'uld. Will O'Neill grant his request or send him back to the Goa'uld to face his fate?

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: An accident at sea cripples a Royal Navy expedition 200 miles from finding the Northwest Passage, forcing its captains to make a dire choice.

programme.title: The Terror

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the 'Glimmerberry Gathering,' until she learns the true meaning behind the festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Terribly worried when her beloved pets don't return home, Strawberry puts on a brave face so as not to worry her friends as they all search for the pets.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When both Raspberry and Berrykin Bruce plan spring-themed events for the same location, Strawberry helps them work out a compromise—they combine their efforts to create a spring fashion show around a water show.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Raspberry finds a way to enlarge the Berrykins to the same size as Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is made to feel self-conscious about an old, patched-together raincoat that she has.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of L. Frank Baum’s classic 'Wonderful Wizard of Oz' – told from Pupcake’s point of view.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum disregards Strawberry’s rule to sign up for use of the café, and is forced to reschedule a big dance recital. She holds a grudge and starts instigating wacky, nonsensical rules to prove rules are silly.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Annie Oatmeal hires both Strawberry Shortcake and Angel Cake to work at her dude ranch.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Unable to sleep with the noise of an all-night construction crew of Berrykins trying to get the power turned back on, Strawberry and the girls go on a campout.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: There’s someone…or something strange in the neighborhood, and the kids imagine the worst.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry struggles with how to be the berry best hostess when she has the very worst house guests.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City holds its first talent show. When the girls discover a talent scout will attend, Lemon decides she has to perform without any help from her friends, even though they are all helping each other.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls plan an elegant afternoon tea party to inaugurate the town’s new dog park, but encounter a mystery when the guests of honor, their puppies, strangely refuse to enter, and no one can figure out why.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland’s one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz is so determined to win the Nearly Once-A-Yearly Strawberryland Games.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: A problem in the sparkleberry juice system that powers the town keeps the girls from doing their work—to the frustration of Cherry Jam, who is struggling to write a song.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.desc: Blueberry entices Huckleberry to come for a visit by asking him to team up and write a mystery story for an online mystery magazine.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: There's a new ghost in town. Amorpho, who can become anyone he sees, decides to switch with Danny, but when their powers collide it makes a mess of things!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Undergrowth, the ghost of all things plant-like, has taken over Amity Park and turned everyone into plants.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: The Guys in White have finally caught on. They offer Jack and Maddie millions for FentonWorks.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: The Box Ghost is tired of being unappreciated as a terrifying ghost. Frustrated, he turns to the box belonging to Pandora, and every time he opens it he unleashes a new evil on the town!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: It's a whole new world for Danny Fenton – he's getting A's, he's the quarterback of the football team, he and Tucker are best pals with Dash, and Sam is his girlfriend. What? Turns out it's all a dream!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny, Sam and Tucker go camping in a creepy, run-down dump. Before everyone can adjust to their surroundings, Mikey runs in claiming a monster in the woods snatched his friend!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danielle Phantom is back! Only this time, she's being hunted by Valerie, whose been tricked by Vlad Masters into thinking the ghost girl is evil.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: When Danny's friend Sam converts the school cafeteria to a recycled veggie menu, Danny must spring into action to thwart an angry Lunch Lady Ghost, who's serving up a heaping helping of the "3 M's": Mayhem, malice, and meat!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: When Danny's after-school ghost activities cause his already mediocre grades to slip, he calls upon his friends Sam and Tucker to help him efficiently manage his time.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny discovers that he has the ghostly power to "overshadow" and inhabit the bodies of others - which comes in handy when his dad, Jack, is called in for a conference.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny needs quick cash to buy clothes for his first homecoming party so he starts selling all his parents' ghost-infected, mechanized junk at a yard sale.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: After some run-ins with Dash, the school bully, Danny uses his powers to get revenge and triggers the ghost of Poindexter, a kid who haunts his locker to this day.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: When Desiree - a ghost that can grant wishes - gives Tucker (Danny's best friend) ghost powers, Danny finds himself dealing with his friend's jealousy in the worst way possible: by having to fight him.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny meets his evil opposite in Vlad Plasmius - a childhood rival of his father that also got ghost powers in an accident.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny thinks he's going to cause his parents to split up when he knocks Jack's anniversary gift into the ghost zone. Desperate to retrieve it, he dives into this ghostly dimension where he runs afoul of Walker: The Ghost Warden of a Ghost Jail.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Jazz has noticed a change in Danny ever since "the accident in the lab." She mistakes his ghost hunting for depression and signs him up for therapy with Penelope Spectra. What Jazz doesn't know is that Spectra is a ghost who feeds off teen misery.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: When ghosts destroy a student's life and popularity in school, she dedicates her life to hunting ghosts. Now Danny has to deal with a threat only a few lockers down the hall. and worse? Danny's best friend, Tucker, has a crush on her.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny and Sam find their platonic friendship turned forcibly romantic through the musical powers of Ember, a hard rocking girl ghost who feeds off the idol worship of teens.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Technus - ghost master of technology - has escaped into Danny's online game! And if they don't stop him, he'll escape into the internet and take over every computer in the world!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Jazz falls for a hunky boy ghost - Johnny 13 - who has the power to cast his shadow out and create bad luck for everyone who crosses him, especially the girls he's dating.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Amity Park learns about the ghost kid and Danny becomes Public Enemy #1.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: In an attempt to beat Dash in a haunted house decorating contest, Danny "borrows" the enchanted sword of the Spirit of Halloween, the Fright Knight!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Vlad returns and provides a special bonding opportunity for Danny and his mom.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Paulina discovers Danny's secret and Johnny 13 returns.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny and Valerie (the ghost-hunting teen) are forced to work together in order to defeat Skulker in the Ghost Zone.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Vlad returns and puts a bounty on Danny.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny and Sam get into a fight, and when Sam utters the words, "I sometimes wish I'd never met you," she finds herself in a world in which she and Danny are strangers.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: After being bitten by tiny green ghost beetles, the kids of Casper High get a mysterious illness that gives them ghost powers and are quarantined at a spooky old hospital outside of town.

programme.desc: Roy Paxton served time for robbery and is released from a Texas prison with a mission: finding the stolen money. Unfortunately, his ex-wife found it first and ran away with her son to Sparta. Will he find the money before the Sparta police find him?

programme.desc: Sheriff McComb asks Chief Gillespie and Virgil Tibbs to help capture an escaped inmate, Ramon Salazar, but they’re both conflicted when they learn that Salazar is a victim of violent political injustice in his native country of war-torn El Salvador.

programme.desc: Norma detiene a Sara para que no revele que su hermana se marchó. Juan está decidido a confesarlo todo, llega a la hacienda con Franco y se encuentran con el derrumbe de la obra.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela y Sara se presentan en la iglesia, pero Jimena y Óscar ya están casados. Él cuenta su versión de la estafa y libra a Eva de toda responsabilidad al contratarlos, Juan lo interrumpe.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar rechaza el dinero que le ofrece Gabriela para que se separe de su hija, ella acepta el consejo de Sara y arruina los planes de su yerno, Jimena pierde los beneficios de ser una Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma le asegura a Fernando que se entregará a él como su esposa, él reacciona con soberbia. Jimena pregunta por Libia, a pesar de los esfuerzos de Juan por mantener ocultos sus recuerdos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se interpone en una decisión de Norma, ellas pierden la paciencia en medio de una discusión. Jimena encuentra un regalo con una nota escrita, la letra es igual a la de su padre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acompaña a Gabriela para rescatar a Jimena, su madre se ofende al saber que ella trabaja en la panadería de Juan. Rosario renuncia al bar para irse de gira con otro representante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela ve a Norma y a Juan cuando se besan, ella le revela quién es el padre de su hijo, su madre cae desmayada, mientras Fernando escucha tras la puerta y sale armado de la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando encuentra a su esposa con las maletas listas, él le deja el camino libre, Gabriela prefiere que se vaya su hija y no Fernando. Juan se angustia porque no conoce la decisión de Norma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena invita a Norma a cenar en la casa de Juan, él tiene miedo de perderla. Franco recibe una oferta de trabajo de Eduvina Trueba, una viuda millonaria que hace lo imposible para seducirlo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela piensa en el cumpleaños de Jimena, cree que es un día amargo para su hija, pero Norma y ella se divierten con Juan y Óscar. Franco se enreda al aceptar ser el secretario de Eduvina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena le cuenta a Norma sus sospechas sobre las intenciones de Óscar y Juan, luego que los escucha hablar de la fortuna Elizondo y encuentra fotos de Libia, se aterran al recordar quién era.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia, una de las vendedoras del mercado, le cuenta todo a Jimena acerca de la muerte de Libia. Franco renuncia a su empleo con Eduvina, y ella le arma un escándalo a Rosario en el bar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena cree que Juan y Óscar quieren envenenarla a ella y a su hermana, tras golpear a su esposo, Norma la rescata en la calle. Franco es traicionado por Rosario y Eduvina intenta suicidarse.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Come join The Addams Family for the most hilarious scarefest of this season or any other! When long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after twenty-five years in the Bermuda Triangle, Gomez and Morticia plan a celebration to wake the dead.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: The family’s future grows bleak when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams begin their adventure from Times Square in New York City, where host Phil Keoghan introduces a new game-changing element, "The Save."

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race continues through London, England, where the Express Pass is on the line, but several teams' hopes of a first-place finish are capsized while boating in a punt in Oxford.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race makes its first-ever visit to the Shetland Islands in Scotland, where teams must corral an unruly flock of sheep down a winding obstacle course.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When tasked with a painstaking Detour, the Dentists face the realization that they may need to use "The Save." Meanwhile, one team's lack of communication leads to a massive meltdown on the mat.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With a double U-turn looming, emotions run high when two teams accuse each other of playing dirty.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers struggle on a frightening Road Block when they're suspended high above the Atlas Mountains.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: THE AMAZING RACE takes off on its milestone 300th leg as teams race through Palermo, Sicily. Two rival teams form unlikely alliances and Racers battle to beat the clock in a high-octane go-cart race through the mountains.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.
